title: Introduction
content: Welcome to Grounded Systems documentation. Modernize from within, with a small senior team that helps yours make real progress without giving up ownership.

title: Brand Guidelines
content: Our visual identity includes a distinctive blue (#1e40af) and slate (#334155) color palette. We use Fraunces for headings and Source Sans 3 for body text. Logos are available in light and dark variants.

title: Design System
content: Core UI components and patterns遵循 our brand guidelines with consistent spacing, typography, and interaction behaviors. Includes cards, callouts, navigation, and responsive layouts.

title: UX Strategy
content: User-centric documentation experience with clarity, discoverability, consistency, responsiveness, and exit strategies. Guides for prospective customers, new practitioners, and existing customers.

title: User Flow
content: Information architecture mapping user journeys from landing to conversion, with clear pathways through documentation sections and call-to-action touchpoints.

title: Contribution Model
content: How to contribute to Grounded Systems documentation following our governance-first approach with clear roles, processes, and quality standards.

title: FAQ
content: Frequently asked questions about Grounded Systems methodology, implementation approaches, and common challenges with modernization in place.

title: Glossary
content: Definitions of key terms used throughout Grounded Systems framework including Trojan Horse, Capability Over Dependency, and Human-Centered Modernization.

title: Premium Components
content: Enhanced UI components including premium callouts, card variations, and improved typography for creating engaging documentation experiences.
